# @zakkster/lite-headless/avatar

User avatar with image + deterministic-color initials fallback.
Classic admin-theme component: try to load the image, fall back
to the user's initials on a hue-derived color background if no
src or load fails.

## Quick example

```js
import { createAvatar } from "@zakkster/lite-headless/avatar";

const av = createAvatar({
    src: "alice.jpg",
    name: "Alice Lee",          // used for initials + color hash
    fallbackDelay: 0,           // ms to wait before showing fallback
                                // (prevents flash for fast loads)
});

av.attachRoot(rootEl);          // data-loaded painted here
av.attachImage(imgEl);          // <img>; hidden when in fallback state
av.attachFallback(fallbackEl);  // data-initials + data-color-hue painted here
```

```html
<span class="avatar">
    <img alt="">
    <span class="avatar-fallback"></span>     <!-- shown when no img or img fails -->
</span>
```

## Options

| Option           | Default | Notes                                               |
| ---------------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| `src`            | `null`  | Image src                                           |
| `name`           | `""`    | User's full name (used for initials + color hash)   |
| `initials`       | -       | Override the derived initials                       |
| `fallbackDelay`  | `0`     | ms to wait before showing fallback (anti-flash)     |
| `onLoad`         | -       | callback                                            |
| `onError`        | -       | callback (fires before fallback delay)              |

## State machine

```
construct (with src)
    │
    ▼
┌──────────┐
│ loading  │   img.src assigned
└────┬─────┘
     │
   load? ──── yes ────→ ┌────────┐
     │                  │ image  │  (img visible, fallback hidden)
   error?               └────────┘
     │
     ▼
  fallbackDelay ───→ ┌──────────┐
                    │ fallback │  (img hidden, fallback visible)
                    └──────────┘
```

`state()` returns one of `"loading"`, `"image"`, `"fallback"`.
The root's `data-loaded` is true ONLY when the image has loaded; absent during loading AND fallback
for CSS purposes (the consumer cares whether the image or the
initials are showing).

## deriveInitials algorithm

Exported helper (used by `createAvatar` internally; also useful
on its own):

```js
import { deriveInitials } from "@zakkster/lite-headless/avatar";

deriveInitials("Alice Lee")          // "AL"
deriveInitials("Jean-Paul Sartre")   // "JS"  (hyphen = word break)
deriveInitials("M. Curie")           // "MC"  (dot = word break)
deriveInitials("john_doe")           // "JD"
deriveInitials("Cher")               // "C"   (single capitalized name → 1 letter)
deriveInitials("zakkster")           // "ZA"  (all-lowercase username → 2 letters)
deriveInitials("john@example.com")   // "JO"  (strip @domain, then 2-letter username)
deriveInitials("")                   // "?"
```

## hueFromString — deterministic color

```js
import { hueFromString } from "@zakkster/lite-headless/avatar";

hueFromString("alice")    // → 142  (always 142 for "alice")
hueFromString("bob")      // → 87
```

FNV-1a hash → hue in [0, 360). Same input always produces the
same hue (stable across reloads). Consumer CSS uses the hue:

```css
[data-avatar-fallback] {
    background: oklch(60% 0.14 var(--hue));
    color: oklch(95% 0.02 var(--hue));
}
```

The primitive sets `--hue` as a CSS custom property on the
fallback element directly, so `var(--hue)` resolves to the right
number per-avatar.

## CSS contract

```css
.avatar {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 2.5rem;
    height: 2.5rem;
    border-radius: 50%;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.avatar img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
}

[data-avatar-fallback] {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: #888;       /* fallback */
    color: #fff;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
}

@supports (color: oklch(0 0 0)) {
    [data-avatar-fallback] {
        background: oklch(60% 0.14 var(--hue));
        color:      oklch(95% 0.02 var(--hue));
    }
}

[data-avatar-fallback]::after {
    content: attr(data-initials);
}
```

## Element wrapper

```html
<lite-avatar name="Alice Lee" src="alice.jpg">
    <img data-avatar-img alt="">
    <span data-avatar-fallback></span>
</lite-avatar>
```

### Attributes

| Attribute        | Effect                                          |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `src`            | Reactive: changing it re-attempts load          |
| `name`           | Initials + color hash source                    |
| `initials`       | Override derived initials                       |
| `fallback-delay` | ms                                              |

### Imperative API + events

```js
host.setSrc(newSrc)
host.state         // "loading" | "image" | "fallback"
host.initials      // string
host.colorHash     // 0..359

host.addEventListener("load",  e => {});
host.addEventListener("error", e => {});
```
